title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Anarock Property Consultants

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Anarock Property Consultants
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Anarock Property Consultants in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Anarock Property Consultants:
Anarock Property Consultants is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anarock Property Consultants!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
